title: PMG weapons
description: Weapons for the PMG group, which is me and my friends.
body:
**This mod is still in development**

# Info ℹ️

A mod that adds weapons for **PMG group**, which is me and my friends.

# Weapons 🗡

1. **Bats** - Made for me, they allow you to dash when right clicked, and have fast attack speed with the downside of low damage
![Bats as of Beta 0.6.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9744d545e9452110c396e6ae6fb756b342a9db80.png)

2. **Daggers** - Made for RadDziad, they apply negative effects to attacked mobs, and some can give you positive effects when right clicked. They have faster attack damage than swords and lower attack
![Daggers as of 0.5.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba145203c8e781e58ac159b757355ed9b183328b.png)

3. **Heavy weapons** - made for Kuba5078, they have high attack damage, but low attack speed. Some have special abilities when righclicked
![Image of all current heavy weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f161142a0407e12a1bd37589a37bdf7c448acbc.png)

4. **Slings** and **Gloves** - made for Istasiek, slings work like bows, they use different ammo and have 3 tiers, currently gloves dont exist
![Slings and ammo as of Beta 0.6.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47ce7f367457223cd802ea03e0da250b2ec845db.png)

# Whats planned?

I want to add weapons for all of my friends that gave me their idea for their weapons, i also have plans to add armors for them, and after that a way to upgrade weapons using something i have plans for, when ill finish adding everything and the mod will be popular enough i will create a discord server where you will be able to give ideas for your own weapons
